linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks are the primary linting mechanism. The CI runs pre-commit on modified files only. For local development, install pre-commit and run 'pre-commit install' to set up git hooks.

setup_required: pip install pytest pytest-timeout pytest-cov psutil
testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest-mock for mocking. Mock files like mock_*.py in tests/ and test fixtures in conftest.py files.
testing.notes: Python tests are in genai-perf/tests/. C++ tests exist in src/test_*.cc using doctest/googletest but require complex CMake build with Triton client libraries, gRPC, and other external dependencies. The CI only runs Python tests. 669 tests passed, 1 failed (minor assertion issue in test_llm_profile_data_parser.py).

gating_checks.name: pytest (genai-perf)
gating_checks.command: cd genai-perf/ && python -m pip install -e .[test] && cd tests && pytest --doctest-modules --junitxml=junit/test-results.xml --cov=genai_perf --cov-report=xml --cov-report=html --ignore-glob=test_models

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request events. Pre-commit workflow validates modified files only. Python package workflow tests genai-perf with Python 3.10 on ubuntu-22.04. C++ tests are not run in CI.

build.build_command: For C++: mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && make
build.notes: Two separate packages: 1) genai-perf (Python) builds with hatchling, 2) perf_analyzer (C++) builds with CMake. C++ build requires Triton client libraries, gRPC, protobuf, and other external dependencies fetched via ExternalProject_Add. Python package includes perf-analyzer as a dependency.

conventions.test_naming: Python: test_* functions in test_*.py files. C++: TEST_CASE or TEST macros in test_*.cc files
conventions.import_style: Python: absolute imports, black/isort formatting with line-length=88
conventions.notes: Python code follows black formatting with 88 char line length. C++ uses clang-format with config in .clang-format. All files must have NVIDIA copyright header (enforced by pre-commit hook).

setup_commands: python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
pip install pytest pytest-timeout pytest-cov psutil
pip install black isort flake8 mypy pre-commit

lint_commands.notes: Found 1 file that would be reformatted (tokenizer.py) - working correctly
No output - imports are correctly formatted
Found multiple violations (F401 unused imports, W503 line breaks, E713, E722, F541) - working correctly
Pre-commit requires git repo and hook setup - not validated in container

test_commands.notes: 669 passed, 1 failed in 21.21s. Single failure is a minor assertion mismatch in test_llm_profile_data_parser.py, not a framework issue.

container_recipe.notes: Container setup validated for Python/genai-perf package only. C++ perf_analyzer requires complex dependencies (Triton client libraries, gRPC, CUDA) and CMake build - not practical to validate in basic container. The CI also only tests Python.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (found legitimate issues), tests OK (669/670 passed)

Pre-commit hooks not fully validated in container - require git repository setup
C++ build not validated - requires external Triton dependencies via ExternalProject_Add
No CI workflow for C++ builds or tests - only Python genai-perf is tested in CI
One test failure in test_llm_profile_data_parser.py - appears to be test data/assertion issue rather than framework problem
